title: trifolium chrysopogon
intro: Trifolium chrysopogon, also known as Chrysopogon zizanioides, is a type of grass native to India and Southeast Asia, and is commonly known as Vetiver. The roots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Trifolium chrysopogon include reducing stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as treating wounds, skin conditions, and menstrual disorders. In herbal preparations, the roots are often used to make essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which are used to treat a variety of health issues.
